title: Crispy Crumps QOL HUD
description: Provides a complete makeover of Minecrafts muddy, hazy HUD with a brand new, shiny, gemlike, readable, QOL based HUD mod that improves user experience through introspective use of color/shape language!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/H6P7IzVMTU8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2213685a7c7dcdaabea6f565668162111350d53.png)

Update to the HUD! Providing a enhanced color pallete and better emphasis on clarity whilst sticking true to the vanilla shape language!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf1b7f26fe7621cdcf9ce6b8e5ef17372613d05c.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513c314b5496ae064b6bd063c5caed0e8f621a14.png)
  
  Crispy Crumps QOL HUD mod Provides a complete makeover of Minecrafts muddy, hazy HUD with a brand new, shiny, gemlike, readable, QOL based HUD that improves user experience through introspective use of color/shape language!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1140cacb575d4051a76a253d4fd7df1c2531481.png)


- All heart status sprites

- Hunger Sprites

- Armor Sprites

- Custom Crosshair

- Hotbar

- And Much more!


Lisence: Free use! Though credit is appreciated!

Be sure to leave feedback on what you think could be improved! And checkout my discord!

https://discord.gg/PVSG7TbVE2
